Traditional Chinese 
	張嶷 (伯岐)


	 Simplified Chinese 
	张嶷 (伯岐)


	 Pronunciation 
	Zhang1 Yi2 (Ba4qi2)


	 Pinyin (Tones) 
	Zhāng Yí (Bàqí)


	 Wade-Giles 
	Chang Ni (Po-ch‘i)

	 Birthplace 
	Nanchong, Baxi Prefecture

	 Other Names 
	Zhang Yi

	 Name Notes 
	張嶷 is commonly translated as both Zhang Yi and Zhang Ni, but only Zhang Ni should be used. The only reference of 嶷 transliterating into Yi is for a mountain range while it transliterates to Ni in other known cases, so it is extremely probable that Ni is the correct transliteration.

full_text:
Zhang Ni (Boqi) 張嶷 (伯岐)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Ni (張嶷), styledBoqi (伯岐), was born in Nanchong, Baxi Prefecture. Wounded by Wang Shuang. Died rescuing Jiang Wei, suffered from arthritis. Zhang Ni was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Zhang Ni lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
